name: ssh-safe-remote
description: Safe, token-efficient SSH wrappers for Codex remote shell work.

interface.shortDescription: Run remote SSH commands without shell quoting traps.
interface.longDescription: SSH Safe Remote provides small wrapper scripts and workflow rules for running remote bash, remote Python, and rsync transfers from Codex while avoiding local shell expansion, remote login-shell surprises, heredoc quoting bugs, and long nested command strings.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use SSH Safe Remote to run remote bash or Python commands safely.
